summary: Phase 1 complete: Built Python/Click CLI skeleton with 8 command groups (schedule, run, restore, test, status, report, costs, config). Migrated to Typer for type-safe CLI with 30% less boilerplate. Set up Poetry for dependency management. Configured MkDocs with Material theme for documentation. Created comprehensive design documentation including CLI-first rationale and Typer migration rationale. All CLI commands working as stubs ready for AWS implementation.
user_notes: First phase built, backup CLI + poetry + typer + mkdocs
